title: stelis entrichota
intro: Stelis entrichota, also known as the "Bee Orchid," is a type of epiphytic orchid native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis entrichota include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, and can also be dried and used as a powder or made into a tincture for medicinal purposes.
